meaning: 广播级录象机的型号之一,由松下公司制定并生产
examples: The successes at MII are opening up possibilities for similar systems at other sites.
AIM: To observe the effect of the environmental temperature on spindles in MII oocytes.
I can't take what Wii Fit tells me too seriously -- I mean, how can it say I ran 5 miles in 20 minutes when my Mii has such stubby little legs?
Say, for instance, you wanna check out Nintendo's Mii-based social network, Miiverse?
We also played a game called Chase Mii, which is a simple game of tag played with multiple gamers.
